lead_profile_text: R2R — 6 bed shared accommodation, Derby DE7. Individual rooms with shared kitchen and facilities (HMO-style). Outside Stayful operating model. Directed to supported living or HMO management provider. Should have been disqualified at first call, not web meeting stage.
emotional_profile: Disqualified at web meeting due to model mismatch — not a financial viability issue

top_objections.text: Shared accommodation (individual rooms, shared kitchen) is outside Stayful operating model
top_objections.zac_response: Directed to supported living or HMO management provider

top_questions.text: Can Stayful manage a 6-bed shared accommodation property?
top_questions.answer: No — Stayful cannot manage shared accommodation; referred to supported living or HMO management provider

what_fell_flat: Stayful cannot manage shared accommodation — automatic model disqualification
This type of property should be screened and redirected at first call, not at web meeting stage — wasted sales capacity

conversion_gaps.gap: Shared accommodation slipped through initial qualification to web meeting stage
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Add explicit shared accommodation screening question to initial call — if property has individual lettable rooms with shared facilities, redirect immediately to HMO specialist
